name: in-my-voice
description: Write in your own captured voice: draft anything from a personal voice profile and flag generic AI-sounding phrasing.

interface.shortDescription: Draft and revise writing in a captured personal voice.
interface.longDescription: Capture a reusable voice profile from samples and short elicitation prompts, draft writing against that profile, and flag generic AI-sounding phrasing before sending.
defaultPrompt: Capture a voice profile from these samples.
Draft this in my captured voice.
Check this draft for generic AI phrasing.
